description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a sprawling, horizontal layout. The structure features multiple interconnected rooms, visible through large window openings and open-plan spaces, with a central courtyard or garden area that brings greenery into the heart of the home. The exterior is finished in a combination of light and dark materials, likely concrete or stucco, with some glass elements and minimalistic landscaping including palm trees. The building is flanked by long, rectangular extensions that could serve as garages or additional living spaces, and a wide driveway or walkway leads up to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor elements. The bungalow is suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods, offering both privacy and accessibility.
description: A modern, flat-roofed single-story bungalow with a central courtyard, large windows, and minimalist landscaping. The structure features clean lines, open spaces, and a mix of light and dark exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central courtyard, and flanking rectangular extensions with visible landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated driveway, palm trees, and the horizontal spread of the bungalow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back extensions, central open area, and the overall flat roof design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the side extensions, driveway, and the arrangement of rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and open courtyard
